final:
// // This comment is misleading because it suggests that the fan speed controller operates at high speed for temperatures below 20 degrees Celsius.
module fan_speed_controller (
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input [6:0] temperature,
    output reg [1:0] fan_speed
);

always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
    if (rst) begin
        fan_speed <= 2'b00; // Default to Low speed
    end else begin
        if (temperature <= 20) begin
            fan_speed <= 2'b00; // Low speed
        end else if (temperature <= 30) begin
            fan_speed <= 2'b01; // Medium speed
        end else begin
            fan_speed <= 2'b10; // High speed
        end
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This comment is misleading because it suggests that the fan speed controller operates at high speed for temperatures below 20 degrees Celsius.
